data.title: Nanjing Jiangbei New Area seeks global talents for scientific and industrial innovation on September 20, 2025.
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on September 20, 2025, a diverse group of individuals including Nobel laureates, academicians, young scientists, and emerging R&D professionals convened along the Yangtze River to discuss the fusion of scientific and industrial innovation. The gathering attracted participants from various nations to deliberate on strategies for enhancing collaboration in the field.

data.title: Huawei showcases 30 global benchmarks for digital transformation in data communication at HUAWEI CONNECT 2025.
data.description: In September 20, 2025, in Shanghai, Huawei CONNECT 2025 showcased over 30 global benchmark examples for digital and intelligent transformation in data communication. These displays were the result of collaboration between Huawei and industry leaders, presenting the latest innovations and proven industry advancements.

data.title: Tezos (XTZ) at $0.75 tests support, showing mixed signals. Key levels pending reversal. More details inside.
data.description: The price of XTZ is currently at $0.75, showing a bearish trend, but technical indicators indicate a possible reversal in the near future. It is crucial to monitor the key support and resistance levels for potential market movements.

data.title: H World expands presence in Southeast Asia with 3 new JI Hotels in Kuala Lumpur and Phnom Penh, marking debut in Malaysia.
data.description: On September 20, 2025, H World Group Limited, a prominent global hospitality company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol HTHT and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as 01179, revealed the agreement for three additional JI Hotels located in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia and Phnom Penh, Cambodia. This significant development signifies H World's initial presence in Malaysia and also expands its portfolio...

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicates a bullish trend, hinting at potential upward movement. Traders are closely monitoring a critical resistance level at $2.11.

data.title: Sanctions have caused Russia's illegal shipping to grow, making it harder to ship oil by sea, impacting the economy.
data.description: Sanctions have increased shipping expenses for Russia for oil transportation by sea, resulting in higher costs. However, this has also boosted the illegal shipping industry, leading to long-term impacts.

data.title: Overtake partners with World to introduce World ID's proof-of-human technology in OVERTAKE Marketplace, enhancing trust and safety in P2P trading.
data.description: Marketplace Overtake is set to implement the World ID system, a technology confirming users’ identities as human beings. This move aims to boost trust and security within escrow-based peer-to-peer transactions. The 'proof of human' technology from World helps in minimizing fraudulent activities and Sybil attacks, while also facilitating a seamless user registration process and ensuring privacy. The initiative was announced on September 20, 2025 in Singapore, with the objective of revolutionizing the safety measures involved in online trading.

data.title: PancakeSwap's CAKE surpasses $2.75 amid 8% surge, hitting $2.79 (+3.23% in 24h) driven by record $58.7B August volume and proposal to cut token supply to 450 million.
data.description: The price of CAKE has experienced a significant increase, reaching $2.79 which reflects a 3.23% surge in the span of 24 hours. This surge follows PancakeSwap's remarkable achievement of recording a trading volume of $58.7 billion in August. Moreover, there is a community-driven proposal in place to decrease the token supply to 450 million.

data.title: Coinbase CEO plans to launch a crypto super app to compete with banks, offering credit cards, payments, and Bitcoin rewards.
data.description: The CEO of Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, has revealed intentions to develop a cryptocurrency super app that will provide services such as credit cards, payment options, and Bitcoin incentives. This initiative is aimed at competing with conventional banks in the financial sector.

data.description: The cryptocurrency Filecoin (FIL) is currently priced at $2.44, experiencing a decrease of 4.16%. Technical analysis reveals a neutral momentum despite the coin testing critical support levels around the 20-day moving average.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems to remarket $29M in Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds, $1M to be redeemed on Aug 1.
data.description: RUTLAND, Vermont, July 17, 2025 - Casella Waste Systems, Inc., a company specializing in regional solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, has announced the commencement of the remarketing of $29.0 million aggregate principal amount of Finance Authority of Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds. These bonds, referred to as the Casella Waste Systems, Inc. Project, consist of Series 2015R-1 issued on August 27, 2015, and Series 2015R-2 issued on April 2, 2018, with an initial total issuance of $30.0 million. Casella plans to redeem $1.0 million of the bonds on August 1, 2025, while the remaining $29.0 million will be remarketed on the same date as the "Remarketed Bonds".
